tasks.subject: Task 1: Add BestAsk to PriceEvent
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose raw ask price from Polymarket WS frame for accurate arb cost computation.

**Files:**
- Modify: `internal/ingestion/ws_common.go`
- Modify: `internal/ingestion/polymarket.go`
- Test: `internal/ingestion/polymarket_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] PriceEvent.BestAsk set from WS best_ask field
- [ ] BestAsk is zero when best_ask missing or unparseable
- [ ] PutPriceEvent zeroes BestAsk
- [ ] Existing tests pass

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/ingestion/... -v` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/ingestion/ws_common.go", "internal/ingestion/polymarket.go", "internal/ingestion/polymarket_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/tajah/projects/market/micro-arb && go test ./internal/ingestion/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PriceEvent.BestAsk set from WS best_ask", "zero when missing", "PutPriceEvent zeroes it", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Decouple Binance from sum-arb signal gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove Binance hard gates blocking signal emission; use BestAsk for spread; fix EntryPrice.

**Files:**
- Modify: `internal/signal/engine.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Signals emit without Binance data
- [ ] Signals emit when Binance stale > 10s
- [ ] Spread uses yesAsk + noAsk when BestAsk available
- [ ] EntryPrice = YES ask price

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/signal/... -v` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/signal/engine.go", "internal/signal/engine_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/tajah/projects/market/micro-arb && go test ./internal/signal/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["emits without Binance", "uses BestAsk", "EntryPrice fixed"]}
```
